title: Fix for top level parameter overwrite when a package has the same parameter name (#3241)

features.name: package with parameter
features.description: Code should include a package that defines a parameter

features.name: top-level module with parameter matching package name
features.description: Code should include a top-level module that defines a parameter with the same name as a parameter in a package

features.name: command-line parameter override via -G flag
features.description: Code should include a compilation scenario with -G flag parameter override applied

features.name: parameter name shadowing between package and module
features.description: Code should include both a package and a module that define parameters with the same name, creating a shadowing scenario
